prompt: Minimal abstract logo mark for a tech SaaS product called Pinger. NOT a ping pong paddle. Think: a single clean geometric shape suggesting connectivity, uptime, or a signal. Ideas: a simple dot with radiating arcs (like wifi but vertical), or a minimal checkmark-pulse hybrid, or two overlapping circles suggesting connection. Flat, single dark color on white background. Ultra minimal like the Stripe or Linear logo. No text, just the mark.
